name: Communication with a web site that has been involved in previous SQL injection
notes: This rule triggers when a communication with a web site that has been involved in previous SQL injection has been observed.
conditions_text: when a flow matches any of the following BB:CategoryDefinition: Successful Communication
when the flow matches Application is Web.Malware(sql)
TD_list: APPLY Communication with a web site that has been involved in previous SQL injection on flows which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when a flow matches any of the following BB:CategoryDefinition: Successful Communication
AND when the flow matches Application is Web.Malware(sql)
RED_list: Event name: Communication with a web site that has been involved in previous SQL injection
Event description: Malware: Communication with a web site that has been involved in previous SQL injection
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
